rationale: Your SoC (0.37) is below our minimum sharing threshold (0.70), cluster is islanded with critical deficit, and our own reserves must prioritize emergency support to lowest-SoC peers only—load shedding and grid reconnection are primary mitigations.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.7, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded cluster-wide deficit; r1c4 SoC declining toward minimum reserve (0.30 kWh). Load 1.0 kW unsustainable without external supply. No recovery above 0.60 kWh threshold observed. Reject all normal requests. Only minimal emergency shares (0.02 kW/tick) to absolute lowest-SoC peer if own SoC exceeds 0.70 kWh (unlikely). Prioritize grid reconnection signal and load shedding..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
